recommendations.title: Brotherhood of the Wolf
recommendations.overview: In 18th century France, the Chevalier de Fronsac and his Native American friend Mani are sent by the King to the Gevaudan province to investigate the killings of hundreds by a mysterious beast.

recommendations.title: Return to Silent Hill

recommendations.director: Brian Yuzna, Shusuke Kaneko, Christophe Gans

recommendations.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
recommendations.overview: An assassin is shot by her ruthless employer, Bill, and other members of their assassination circle – but she lives to plot her vengeance.

recommendations.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart to Hades
recommendations.overview: Ogami Itto volunteers to be tortured by Yakuza in order to save a prostitute and is hired by their leader to kill an evil chamberlain.
